chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The board may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.002 — Rulemaking Authority

The board may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 70, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The board may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 70, eff. September 1, 2011.
